name: ADVFN Plc
summary: ADVFN plc, together with subsidiaries, develops and provides financial information primarily through the Internet and research services in the United Kingdom, the United States, and internationally. It also develops and explores ancillary Internet sites; and operates an Internet dating Website, and financial information Website, as well as provides office services, and brokerage and software development services. ADVFN plc was incorporated in 1989 and is based in Ongar, the United Kingdom.
